contents: (** This file proves the third isomorphism theorem,

Require Import
  Basics.Notations
  Colimits.Quotient
  Classes.interfaces.canonical_names
  Classes.theory.ua_quotient_algebra
  Classes.theory.ua_isomorphic
  Classes.theory.ua_first_isomorphism
  Spaces.List.Core.

(** This section defines the quotient [cong_quotient] of two
    congruences [Φ] and [Ψ], where [Ψ] is a subcongruence of [Φ].
    It is shown that [cong_quotient] is a congruence. *)

Definition cong_quotient (_ : ∀ s x y, Ψ s x y → Φ s x y)
    (s : Sort σ) (a b : (A/Ψ) s)
    := ∀ (x y : A s), in_class (Ψ s) a x → in_class (Ψ s) b y → Φ s x y.

#[export] Instance equivalence_relation_quotient (s : Sort σ)
    : EquivRel (cong_quotient subrel s).

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall (s0 : Sort σ) (x y : A s0), Ψ s0 x y -> Φ s0 x y
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall (s0 : Sort σ) (x y : A s0), Ψ s0 x y -> Φ s0 x y
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall (s0 : Sort σ) (x y : A s0), Ψ s0 x y -> Φ s0 x y
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall (s0 : Sort σ) (x y : A s0), Ψ s0 x y -> Φ s0 x y
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall (s0 : Sort σ) (x y : A s0), Ψ s0 x y -> Φ s0 x y
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall (s0 : Sort σ) (x y : A s0), Ψ s0 x y -> Φ s0 x y

goals.conclusion: forall a : A s, cong_quotient subrel s (class_of (Ψ s) a) (class_of (Ψ s) a)

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall s0 : Sort σ, Relation (A s0)
forall (s0 : Sort σ) (x y : A s0), Ψ s0 x y -> Φ s0 x y

contents:
Lemma for_all_relation_quotient {w : list (Sort σ)} (a b : FamilyProd A w)
    : for_all_2_family_prod (A/Ψ) (A/Ψ) (cong_quotient subrel)
        (map_family_prod (λ s, class_of (Ψ s)) a)
        (map_family_prod (λ s, class_of (Ψ s)) b) →
      for_all_2_family_prod A A Φ a b.

goals.conclusion:
for_all_2_family_prod (A / Ψ) (A / Ψ) (cong_quotient subrel)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) a)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) b) ->
for_all_2_family_prod A A Φ a b

forall s : Sort σ, Relation (A s)
forall (s : Sort σ) (x y : A s), Ψ s x y -> Φ s x y

for_all_2_family_prod (A / Ψ) (A / Ψ) (cong_quotient subrel)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) a)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) b) ->
for_all_2_family_prod A A Φ a b

forall s : Sort σ, Relation (A s)
forall (s : Sort σ) (x y : A s), Ψ s x y -> Φ s x y

goals.conclusion: for_all_2_family_prod A A Φ a b

forall (s : Sort σ) (x y : A s), Ψ s x y -> Φ s x y

for_all_2_family_prod (A / Ψ) (A / Ψ) (cong_quotient subrel)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) a)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) b)
forall s : Sort σ, Relation (A s)
forall s : Sort σ, Relation (A s)
forall (s : Sort σ) (x y : A s), Ψ s x y -> Φ s x y

goals.conclusion: Φ a0 (fst a) (fst b) * for_all_2_family_prod A A Φ (snd a) (snd b)

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, Relation (A s)
forall s : Sort σ, Relation (A s)
forall (s : Sort σ) (x y : A s), Ψ s x y -> Φ s x y

cong_quotient subrel a0 (class_of (Ψ a0) (fst a)) (class_of (Ψ a0) (fst b)) *
for_all_2_family_prod (carriers_quotient_algebra A Ψ)
  (carriers_quotient_algebra A Ψ) (cong_quotient subrel)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) (snd a))
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) (snd b))

forall a1 b0 : FamilyProd A w,
for_all_2_family_prod (carriers_quotient_algebra A Ψ)
  (carriers_quotient_algebra A Ψ) (cong_quotient subrel)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) a1)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) b0) ->
for_all_2_family_prod A A Φ a1 b0
forall s : Sort σ, Relation (A s)
forall s : Sort σ, Relation (A s)
forall (s : Sort σ) (x y : A s), Ψ s x y -> Φ s x y

goals.conclusion: Φ a0 (fst a) (fst b) * for_all_2_family_prod A A Φ (snd a) (snd b)

goals.conclusion:
forall (x : FamilyProd A (dom_symboltype (σ u)))
(b : FamilyProd (A / Ψ) (dom_symboltype (σ u))),
for_all_2_family_prod (A / Ψ) (A / Ψ) (cong_quotient subrel)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) x) b ->
cong_quotient subrel (cod_symboltype (σ u))
  (ap_operation u.#(A / Ψ) (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) x))
  (ap_operation u.#(A / Ψ) b)

cong_quotient subrel (cod_symboltype (σ u))

forall s : Sort σ, Relation (A s)
forall (s : Sort σ) (x y : A s), Ψ s x y -> Φ s x y

contents: (* It should not be necessary to provide the explicit types: *)

destruct (compute_op_quotient A Ψ u a
              : ap_operation (u.#(A / Ψ))
                 (map_family_prod (λ s, class_of (Ψ s)) _) = _)^.

goals.conclusion:
for_all_2_family_prod (A / Ψ) (A / Ψ) (cong_quotient subrel)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) a)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) b) ->
cong_quotient subrel (cod_symboltype (σ u))
  (class_of (Ψ (cod_symboltype (σ u))) (ap_operation u.#A a))
  (ap_operation u.#(A / Ψ) (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) b))

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, Relation (A s)
forall s : Sort σ, Relation (A s)
forall (s : Sort σ) (x y : A s), Ψ s x y -> Φ s x y

contents:
destruct (compute_op_quotient A Ψ u b
              : ap_operation (u.#(A / Ψ))
                 (map_family_prod (λ s, class_of (Ψ s)) _) = _)^.

goals.conclusion:
for_all_2_family_prod (A / Ψ) (A / Ψ) (cong_quotient subrel)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) a)
  (map_family_prod (λ s : Sort σ, class_of (Ψ s)) b) ->
cong_quotient subrel (cod_symboltype (σ u))

Definition def_third_surjection (s : Sort σ) : (A/Ψ) s → (A/Φ) s
    := Quotient_rec (Ψ s) _ (class_of (Φ s)) (third_surjecton_well_def s).

Lemma oppreserving_third_surjection {w : SymbolType σ} (f : Operation A w)
    : ∀ (α : Operation (A/Φ) w) (Qα : ComputeOpQuotient A Φ f α)
        (β : Operation (A/Ψ) w) (Qβ : ComputeOpQuotient A Ψ f β),
      OpPreserving def_third_surjection β α.

goals.conclusion:
forall a : A t,
(fix OpPreserving (w0 : SymbolType σ) :
     Operation (A / Ψ) w0 -> Operation (A / Φ) w0 -> Type :=
   match
     w0 as w1 return (Operation (A / Ψ) w1 -> Operation (A / Φ) w1 -> Type)
   with
   | ne_list.one s =>
       λ (α0 : Operation (A / Ψ) (ne_list.one s))
       (β0 : Operation (A / Φ) (ne_list.one s)),
       def_third_surjection s α0 = β0
   | ne_list.cons s y =>
       λ (α0 : Operation (A / Ψ) (ne_list.cons s y))
       (β0 : Operation (A / Φ) (ne_list.cons s y)),
       forall x : (A / Ψ) s,
       OpPreserving y (α0 x) (β0 (def_third_surjection s x))
   end)
  w (β (class_of (Ψ t) a)) (α (def_third_surjection t (class_of (Ψ t) a)))

(fix OpPreserving (w0 : SymbolType σ) :
     Operation (A / Ψ) w0 -> Operation (A / Φ) w0 -> Type :=

   with
   | ne_list.one s =>
       λ (α0 : Operation (A / Ψ) (ne_list.one s))
       (β0 : Operation (A / Φ) (ne_list.one s)),
       def_third_surjection s α0 = β0
   | ne_list.cons s y =>
       λ (α0 : Operation (A / Ψ) (ne_list.cons s y))
       (β0 : Operation (A / Φ) (ne_list.cons s y)),
       forall x0 : (A / Ψ) s,
       OpPreserving y (α0 x0) (β0 (def_third_surjection s x0))
   end)
  w (β (class_of (Ψ t) x)) (α (def_third_surjection t (class_of (Ψ t) x)))

Definition hom_third_isomorphism : Homomorphism (A/Ψ/Θ) (A/Φ)
    := transport (λ X, Homomorphism X (A/Φ))
          path_quotient_algebras_third_surjection
          (hom_first_isomorphism_surjection hom_third_surjection).
